item.title: Professional File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Professional File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Have you stressed due to accidentally deletion of essential photos, pictures, images from memory stick? Just click on company website www.filerecoverysoftware.org and download File Recovery Software which helps user to fast locate and restore complete erased data, documents from USB removable media disk in easiest way. Flexible solution allows user to take data backup and regains all deleted erased files from any digital storage media in simplified manner without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.description:

Have you stressed due to accidentally deletion of essential photos, pictures, images from memory stick? Flexible solution allows user to take data backup and regains all deleted erased files from any digital storage media in simplified manner without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Have you stressed due to accidentally deletion of essential photos, pictures, images from memory stick? Just click on company website www.filerecoverysoftware.org and download File Recovery Software which helps user to fast locate and restore complete erased data, documents from USB removable media disk in easiest way. Flexible solution allows user to take data backup and regains all deleted erased files from any digital storage media in simplified manner without any expert guidance.

item.title: New Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: New Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
New Windows 11 Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.
1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu
3. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
4. Auto Detect Icons
5. Responsive
6. Light
7. Easy to install


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
1. Open Terminal and type : Bash install.sh
2. Add Windong11-Button to Panel

[read more]

item.title: USB Drive Files Recovery Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Files Recovery Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Files Recovery Program
(Office Apps)
Install astounding USB Drive Files Recovery Program that facilitates user to regain missing data including snapshots, music library, and many more from USB memory key drive in just minimal time require. Amazing flash drive data retrieval tool is capable to restore data deleted from USB flash memory drive due to human mistake or virus/worm attack, formatted/re-formatted flash drives, hardware failure and any logical error messages, which prevent user to access data.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Drive Files Recovery Program
(Office Apps)
Install astounding USB Drive Files Recovery Program that facilitates user to regain missing data including snapshots, music library, and many more from USB memory key drive in just minimal time require. Amazing flash drive data retrieval tool is capable to restore data deleted from USB flash memory drive due to human mistake or virus/worm attack, formatted/re-formatted flash drives, hardware failure and any logical error messages, which prevent user to access data.

item.content:encoded:
USB Drive Files Recovery Program
(Office Apps)
Install astounding USB Drive Files Recovery Program that facilitates user to regain missing data including snapshots, music library, and many more from USB memory key drive in just minimal time require. Amazing flash drive data retrieval tool is capable to restore data deleted from USB flash memory drive due to human mistake or virus/worm attack, formatted/re-formatted flash drives, hardware failure and any logical error messages, which prevent user to access data.

item.title: Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: kdetools
item.itunes:summary:
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download
(Utilities)
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free is proficient tool for converting offline [offline storage table] OST files to Outlook [personal storage table] with emails, contacts, calendar, tasks, attachments etc. KDETools OST to PST Converter tool is a helpful and faster solution to repair corrupt OST files and Convert OST to PST file format, Office 365, Google Mail, Online Outlook, Yahoo, G Suite etc.




[read more]

item.title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]
item.description:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]

item.title: MD Screen Ruler [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: MD Screen Ruler [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: md2222
item.itunes:summary:
MD Screen Ruler
(Graphic Apps)
Screen ruler with simple color picker and screenshot tool. Measures a selected area. Has the magnifier for precise selection.
Overlaps the screen with a transparent window for drawing. The taskbar does not overlap.
Selecting an area with Ctrl key leaves the selection when the mouse button is released. This used for area screenshot.
You can draw on the screen before make screenshot. Use mouse with Shift key. Tools in the screen context menu.
There is also mode for resize and moving capture area.

Hotkeys:
Ctrl-Space, Mouse middle button - Capture current color
Ctrl-C - Capture current color and copy to clipboard
Ctrl-S - Copy screenshot to clipboard
Ctrl-Z - Undo drawn object

0.4.2 - 10 sec delay for screenshot when Alt key pressed. Solid line always for area < 12 px.
0.5.7 - Desktop overlap indicator. Areas menu item.
0.7.4 - Resize area mode

If you cannot draw an area in Manjaro set gtk2/fusion style in Qt5 Settings.

You can extract contents of an AppImage and use one program file if your system has libraries.
./mdruler-074-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
Files will be extracted to "squashfs-root" directory.
The bundle includes files install.sh and uninstall.sh for installing the bin-version.
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.

[read more]
item.description:
MD Screen Ruler
(Graphic Apps)
Screen ruler with simple color picker and screenshot tool. Measures a selected area. Has the magnifier for precise selection.
Overlaps the screen with a transparent window for drawing. The taskbar does not overlap.
Selecting an area with Ctrl key leaves the selection when the mouse button is released. This used for area screenshot.
You can draw on the screen before make screenshot. Use mouse with Shift key. Tools in the screen context menu.
There is also mode for resize and moving capture area.

Hotkeys:
Ctrl-Space, Mouse middle button - Capture current color
Ctrl-C - Capture current color and copy to clipboard
Ctrl-S - Copy screenshot to clipboard
Ctrl-Z - Undo drawn object

0.4.2 - 10 sec delay for screenshot when Alt key pressed. Solid line always for area < 12 px.
0.5.7 - Desktop overlap indicator. Areas menu item.
0.7.4 - Resize area mode

If you cannot draw an area in Manjaro set gtk2/fusion style in Qt5 Settings.

You can extract contents of an AppImage and use one program file if your system has libraries.
./mdruler-074-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
Files will be extracted to "squashfs-root" directory.
The bundle includes files install.sh and uninstall.sh for installing the bin-version.
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MD Screen Ruler
(Graphic Apps)
Screen ruler with simple color picker and screenshot tool. Measures a selected area. Has the magnifier for precise selection.
Overlaps the screen with a transparent window for drawing. The taskbar does not overlap.
Selecting an area with Ctrl key leaves the selection when the mouse button is released. This used for area screenshot.
You can draw on the screen before make screenshot. Use mouse with Shift key. Tools in the screen context menu.
There is also mode for resize and moving capture area.

Hotkeys:
Ctrl-Space, Mouse middle button - Capture current color
Ctrl-C - Capture current color and copy to clipboard
Ctrl-S - Copy screenshot to clipboard
Ctrl-Z - Undo drawn object

0.4.2 - 10 sec delay for screenshot when Alt key pressed. Solid line always for area < 12 px.
0.5.7 - Desktop overlap indicator. Areas menu item.
0.7.4 - Resize area mode

If you cannot draw an area in Manjaro set gtk2/fusion style in Qt5 Settings.

You can extract contents of an AppImage and use one program file if your system has libraries.
./mdruler-074-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
Files will be extracted to "squashfs-root" directory.
The bundle includes files install.sh and uninstall.sh for installing the bin-version.
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.

[read more]

item.title: Camera File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Camera File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Camera File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Do you want to bring back your misplaced picture files from Semi Professional Camera captured on various occasions in simplified way? Use easy to operate Camera File Recovery Software that provides excellent solution to regain your favourite images from your Specialty Camera even if system generated error messages like ‘Disk not detected’ displayed while accessing your digital camera on your personal computer.

[read more]
item.description:
Camera File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Do you want to bring back your misplaced picture files from Semi Professional Camera captured on various occasions in simplified way? Use easy to operate Camera File Recovery Software that provides excellent solution to regain your favourite images from your Specialty Camera even if system generated error messages like ‘Disk not detected’ displayed while accessing your digital camera on your personal computer.

[read more]
